page_metadata.biotools__summary: Simple and fast web tool for everyday list comparison, e.g. of genes. Shows the intersection, union, and Jaccard index. Allows easy copying & pasting of comparison results.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Simple and fast web tool for everyday list comparison, e.g. of genes. Shows the intersection, union, and Jaccard index. Allows easy copying & pasting of comparison results.
